---
title: "Year One"
image: "/assets/mjb_favicon.png"
location: "Dublin City University, Ireland"
---

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
This page contains a summary of the work I have done during my first year in university. 
:::

## Introduction to Microeconomics

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](https://external-content.duckduckgo.com/iu/?u=https%3A%2F%2Feducationleaves.com%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2024%2F08%2FMicroeconomics-1024x576.png&f=1&nofb=1&ipt=31a3d6024c05b4345071d5aa64e47f3d5f7bd57e412774157932b0469fdf95f5)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Developed foundational microeconomic analysis covering supply/demand, elasticity, consumer/producer surplus, market failure, perfect competition, monopoly pricing and welfare economics.

Applied graphical and mathematical models to analyze market outcomes and policy interventions.

Grading: 15% participation, 20% mid-term exam, 65% final exam.

:::

:::

## The Global Business Environment

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](https://external-content.duckduckgo.com/iu/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fonline.york.ac.uk%2Fmedia%2Fmageplaza%2Fblog%2Fpost%2Fg%2Fl%2Fglobal-business-environment.jpg&f=1&nofb=1&ipt=f829e05b6887d66bf90673e0a216d643763fe113ead13c3f87cb9959ee6162a8)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Explored globalisation dynamics including trade patterns, multinational corporations, global value chains, cultural convergence/divergence, environmental impacts and geopolitical tensions.

Analysed contemporary global challenges through case studies and theoretical frameworks.

Grading: 30% group assignment, 70% final essay.

:::

:::

## Introductory Accounting for Business

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](https://external-content.duckduckgo.com/iu/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.prod.website-files.com%2F62ff26d72ea5e01571feb3d8%2F65681f597a81949d42a10f12_How-to-do-accounting-for-a-small-business.webp&f=1&nofb=1&ipt=f4eb87a4b1ca29b680f55d8e1ba23a3e7db26953977dfd0f935c131cc5598796)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Mastered fundamental accounting principles including double-entry bookkeeping, financial statements preparation (balance sheet, income statement, cash flow), ratio analysis and basic managerial accounting.

Developed skills in transaction recording, ledger management and financial reporting interpretation.

Grading: 30% continuous assignments, 30% group assignment, 40% video presentation.

:::

:::

## Introduction to Marketing

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](../../assets/module_image/marketing.jpg) 

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Developed core marketing principles covering market segmentation, targeting, positioning, marketing mix (4Ps), consumer behavior, branding and digital marketing strategies.

Analysed marketing case studies and applied frameworks to strategic decision-making.

Grading: 15% assignments, 25% group assignment, 60% exam. 

:::

:::

## Business Analytics 1

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](https://external-content.duckduckgo.com/iu/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdataanalysis.co.zw%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2022%2F09%2FBusiness-Analytics-Using-Excel.jpg&f=1&nofb=1&ipt=3a70ffe1b789983a3c6a25dd74e81eddb4386b2fe90783514a0654c063ae5550)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Gained introductory data analytics skills using Tableau for visualization, Excel for data manipulation, basic statistical analysis and dashboard creation for business insights.

Applied analytical tools to real datasets through structured exercises and exam scenarios.

Grading: 10% Tableau exercise, 30% weekly assignments, 50% exam. 

:::

:::

## Critical Thinking for Business

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](https://external-content.duckduckgo.com/iu/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcommunity.thriveglobal.com%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2020%2F02%2FCritical-Thinking.png&f=1&nofb=1&ipt=340686750e4e01fb5e2f92faa0735cf6baf1a5f96cab090eb81957a005a1ef63)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Built essential critical thinking foundations including argument identification, logical fallacies, evidence evaluation, reasoning patterns and structured problem-solving approaches.

Practiced analytical skills through continuous exercises, discussions and written analysis.

Grading: 100% continuous assignments. 

:::

:::

## Learning Innovation for Enterprise

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](https://external-content.duckduckgo.com/iu/?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftse4.mm.bing.net%2Fth%2Fid%2FOIP.WEKMZBVS3dCZ3PT9NU9UKAHaE3%3Fpid%3DApi&f=1&ipt=1a8f5f6baf363b63fcdd6dcc54551421607779cc2a15c0ac6cc440f09fc19752&ipo=images)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

[Assignment 1](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yearone), &nbsp; [Assignment 2](https://martinas-jucysbrady.github.io/studies/yeartwo)

Developed personal/professional development skills through media literacy, teamwork, digital portfolio creation and self-reflection on learning experiences.

Applied creative and collaborative approaches to real-world projects showcasing transferable skills.

Grading: 30% media project, 30% group project, 40% eportfolio. 

:::

:::

## Japanese Language 1 

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](../../assets/module_image/japan_l1.png) 

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

Developed complete beginner Japanese proficiency through hiragana/katakana mastery, basic greetings, numbers, particles, simple present/past grammar, everyday vocabulary and introductory conversations.

Built foundational listening, speaking, reading and writing skills for basic communication needs.

Grading: continuous assignments, tests and exam. 

:::

:::

## Japanese Language 2

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](../../assets/module_image/japan_l2.png)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

Built on Japanese 1 foundations with expanded grammar (te-form, adjectives, transitive/intransitive verbs), additional kanji (50-100 characters), descriptive sentences and situational dialogues.

Progressed to intermediate beginner level with increased focus on sentence patterns and practical usage.

Grading: continuous assignments, tests and exam. 

:::

:::
